svg.text: Perfect-L cascade — sheets placed per the design
Strips re-coloured: orange = orange-fed donor or destination, blue = blue-fed. Geometry from the 6-face cascade.
Each cross-pair arrow shows where the donor sheets' offcuts land.

g.text: orange donor face / its offcut dest.
blue donor face / its offcut dest.
Lighter shading on hip-ends & valley = offcut destination
